# Luut SLU

> Streetwear marketplace and outfit discovery platform in Saint Lucia. Connects local sellers with buyers for meetup-based purchases.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse streetwear, outfits, and new arrivals from local sellers.
- [Shop](/shop): Full product catalog with category filters and search.
- [New Arrivals](/shop/new-arrivals): Latest drops and freshly listed items.
- [Best Sellers](/shop/best-sellers): Top-selling products across all sellers.
- [Sellers](/sellers): Discover and browse individual seller storefronts.
- [Sell on Luut](/sell): Learn how to become a seller and list your products.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Luut team.
- [Meetup Policy](/meetup-policy): Guidelines for safe in-person order exchanges.
- [Deposit Policy](/deposit-policy): Terms for order deposits and holds.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Refund and return conditions.
